compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement performance_overlay detection in classifier
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add performance-sensitive pattern detection to review-complexity-classifier.sh and compute the performance_overlay flag.

### Implementation
1. Add is_performance_sensitive() function checking file paths: */db/*, */database/*, */cache/*, */query/*, */pool/*, */persistence/*
2. Add diff content scanning for performance keywords in added lines: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, cursor, pool, async, await, threading, multiprocessing
3. Replace hardcoded performance_overlay=false with computed value
4. PERFORMANCE_OVERLAY=true if any scoring file matches OR diff contains performance keywords

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] DB paths trigger performance_overlay=true
  Verify: printf 'diff --git a/src/db/models.py b/src/db/models.py\nindex 0..1 100644\n--- a/src/db/models.py\n+++ b/src/db/models.py\n@@ -1 +1 @@\n+x' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['performance_overlay']==True"
